meta.title: IntuiFy — Software Studio & Digital Innovation
meta.description: IntuiFy designs and launches apps for Apple Store and Google Play in under a week. Custom software, AI, digital marketing and cutting-edge tech solutions.

hero.title: We build the future, one app at a time
hero.subtitle: From concept to Apple Store and Google Play in under 7 days. IntuiFy is the tech studio that turns your ideas into real digital products — fast, no compromises.

showcase.title: Our pioneer products
showcase.subtitle: Platforms and apps we designed, developed and published — from the first line of code to store launch

items.name: Auterio
items.description: Digital platform for car dealerships. Vehicle management, appraisals, digital wallet and analytics dashboard.

items.name: Orqesia
items.description: AaaS (Agents as a Service) platform for lead management. Multi-agent orchestration with 6+ AI agents programmed to convert every lead into a sale, fully automated.

items.name: Eco Andratx
items.description: Civic app for waste management and recycling in Andratx. Collection calendar, reports and green points.

items.name: LingoBite
items.description: SaaS platform for restaurants that auto-translates menus into 30+ languages with AI. Dynamic QR codes.

process.title: From your idea to launch in < 7 days
process.subtitle: Our ultra-fast process is designed for startups, entrepreneurs and companies that can't afford to wait

steps.title: Brief & Strategy
steps.description: We analyze your idea, define scope and technical architecture

steps.title: Design & Prototype
steps.description: Premium UI/UX, interactive wireframes and complete design system

steps.title: Full-Stack Development
steps.description: Clean code, API, database, AI integration and scalable backend

steps.title: Test & Launch
steps.description: Rigorous QA, deploy to Apple Store and Google Play, go-live

services.title: What we build
services.subtitle: From strategic consulting to publication — we cover every phase of your digital product lifecycle

items.title: Mobile & Web Apps
features: Native and cross-platform apps (React Native, Expo)
Publishing to Apple Store and Google Play

items.title: Industry Solutions
features: Real estate portals and property management

benefits.title: Why choose IntuiFy
benefits.subtitle: We're not a traditional agency. We're engineers, designers and entrepreneurs who build real products every day

items.title: Extreme speed
items.description: From first call to live product in under 7 days. No months of waiting, no bureaucracy.

items.title: Full-Stack in-house
items.description: Design, frontend, backend, AI, deploy — all under one roof. Zero third-party dependency.

items.title: Guaranteed publication
items.description: Your project ends up on Apple Store and Google Play. We handle the entire review and publishing process.

items.title: Modern tech stack
items.description: Next.js, React Native, Supabase, Stripe, AI — we use the most advanced technologies on the market.

items.title: Transparent pricing
items.description: Clear budget from the start. No hidden costs, no surprises at the end of the project.

items.title: Post-launch support
items.description: We don't disappear after deploy. Continuous maintenance, updates and technical support.

cta_section.title: Got an idea? Let's launch it together
cta_section.subtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll show you how we can make it real in under a week.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.subtitle: Fill the form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours with a tailored proposal and real timeline.

form.name: Full name
form.message_placeholder: I need an app for... (describe your idea, industry, main features, target audience)

footer.tagline: IntuiFy designs and launches applications for Apple Store and Google Play in record time. From concept to publication, we're your tech partner.
